commit.message:
Implemented soft-line breaks (... / ,) and refactored parsePrint()

-> new TokenKind:
	* ... <dotsToken>
	* , <commaToken>
-> ... (soft-break) modifies current position or offset from using peek(). Only allows 1 \n after the dots
-> , (line-break) substitutes for a \n. Not allowed at the start of a keyword e.g. , SUM OF 1 AN 2
-> changed parsePrint() to be more readable. It now resembles the other two inifinite arity operations (infarop & concat)
-> New method: isEOL():
	* checks if currentToken is a line terminator (\n, \0, or comma)

Fix some errors which causes program to crash.

Evaluator:
-> Evaluator will now set programCounter = null if there are parser errors before execution of nextInstruction()
	* updateLineCounter() throws an error if there are certain parser errors. This prevents that
Parser:
-> match() will no longer call nextToken() if current() is <eofToken>
-> <eofToken> is now used as delimiter for various parse methods

->	Disallow usage of <typeToken> as operand for MAEK

commit.message:
implemented IS NOW A

-> will modify an existing variable's vartype
-> will also change its value (e.g. 52 (int) -> WIN (bool))

Moved special yarn handling to Evaluator

-> replacement now happens during VISIBLE or during GIMMEH

implement GIMMEH

	* special characters do not work if it was part of the input

Implicit Typecast from yarn -> troof is now allowed

	* see page 6 of specifications, concatenation section
	> `WIN` will becomes "WIN"
implemented SMOOSH
VISIBLE now automatically adds \n unless it ends with !

implemented special characters for yarn literals

	* :> = \t
	* :) = \n
	* :o = \g
	* :: = :
	* :" = "

modified evalCmpOp()

-> cmpOp now checks varType and returns false if mismatch

implement evalCmpOp()

-> still in progress; comparisons should be strict.
VISIBLE now prints the results of mathOp and boolOp

implemented evaluate boolOp. New method typecastToken()

-> typecastToken() will now take care of implicit typecasting
	* accepts 2 parameters, token to cast and datatype
	* returns a token with the correct datatype if cast is applicable
-> evalBoolOp() returns a troofToken if successful

implement evaluate VISIBLE

-> new TokenKind = whitespaceToken
-> Changed lexer to accept whitespaceTokens if enclosed inside quotes
-> parseYarn() method inside parser modified to remove space for last
word
-> evalPrint() only accepts literals and varid for now
added typecasting to parseTerminal()
fixed program crashing when KTHXBYE is not present

improved consumeEOL() method and additional syntax check for loops

-> consumeEOL() now returns the last eolToken
-> consumeEOL() will now be used when match(TokenKind.eolToken) is used
-> condition for loops is now limited to <cmpop> only
parse loops
parse ifblock and switchcase
New SyntaxType and Node class for flowcontrol
added groundwork for flow control parsing

Added getStrChildren, an option to show the parse tree, fix for VISIBLE

-> getStrChildren returns a String version of the parseTree
-> Removed menu item "Program" and replaced with "View" and "Run"
-> View will contain any cuistomizations for the GUI:
	* set font size
	* show parse tree
	* etc.
-> Run will contain run program instructions
-> parsePrint modified to fix error resulting in having the last operand
be invalid

Added parsing for GIMMEH, changes to SMOOSH and VISIBLE

-> new method lazyMatch() which  matches with a token optionally
-> SMOOSH uses lazyMatch() to potentially match MKAY token
-> fixed VISIBLE crashing when invalid keyword is used as operand
Proper fetching of variable value from symbol table & hotkeys
sync

Implemented Eval newVar

-> Adds new var to symboltable
-> MathOP is allowed to be the value
-> Or other literals

Created enum SyntaxType & eval MathOp

-> enum SyntaxType keeps track of the type of the SyntaxNodes for
typecasting
-> MathOp is evaluated for simple int and float and bool.
-> String operands for mathop stops execution

Evaluator is now used instead of lexer at the frontend

-> added necessary getters in evaluator
-> initialization of IT

created Evaluator and SymbolTable

-> evaluator is for communication with the frontend & semantic analysis

Changed the way to get keyword type

-> Added new TokenKind attribute, type
	* stores the type of the token
	* math operation, boolean operation, etc.
-> Removed boolean expressions
Merge branch 'master' of https://github.com/jpcarreon/loco.git
Update README.md

commit.message: added documentation
optimization for the lexer
Implement open/save file

Allows the tokens table to be populated

-> renamed AlertWindow class to InputWindow

added frontend package w/ GUI

-> Program menu:
	* Set Font: set the font of the text areas
	* Run: Outputs to the console the tokens from left text area

refactoring

-> Switched execution environment from JavaSE-11 to JavaSE-16
-> Moved Main method to a separate package
-> Renamed frontend to backend
-> frontend will now only contain the main class and GUI

Demarcation of statement types; parse variable change

-> Statements are now categorized by either expression, assignment or
flow control

Refactor NodeAssignment to NodeDeclaration

-> to allow the demarcation of expressions, assignments and flow control

Parse concat & fixed some error handling

-> Yarn tokens are now produced once the current() is a quoteToken
-> Fixed possible crashes as a result of loops in:
	* parseYarn()
	* parseInfArOp()
	* parseComment()
-> Moved boolean methods to the bottom
Parse inf arity op and comparison op
Implemented booloperation parsing

Refactor NodeMathOp to NodeOperation

-> Allows the class to be reused for boolean operation
variable declaration parsing

Made a root node to contain start and end tokens

-> Parser now parses multiline comments
-> Single line comments are ignored

Added more TokenKind

-> I/O tokens
-> If tokens
-> Loop tokens

Changed Regex of keywords with more than 1

-> Added comparison, relational, contatenation and typecast keywords

Changed how Lexer tokenization:

-> parseFile() will now scan character by character
-> fixLexemes() will convert the characters to proper keywords/numerals
-> nextToken() will now use peek() to match keywords with more than 1
word
initial commmit of CFG

Implemented parse()

-> Currently only parses:
	* <program>
	* <statement>
	* <expression>
	* <mathop>
Implemented Parser constructor
Initial commit of Parser

Changed Lexer:

-> Tokenizes word by word
-> Removed ArrayList container for Tokens
-> Re-added nextToken() function to tokenize

Changed Enum TokenKind:

-> Added two attributes for each value
-> String regex = contains the regex to match the value
-> int length = stores the length of the keyword (SUM OF = 2 ; I HAS A =
3 ; HAI = 1)
added newline to lexer
Merge branch 'master' of https://github.com/jpcarreon/loco

Multiline lexer (inc)

-> Reads sample.lol file
-> Tokenizes line by line
Create README.md
